seoTitle: Shelly Beach vs Sherwood — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Shelly Beach and Sherwood. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Shelly Beach vs Sherwood: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Shelly Beach and Sherwood.
heading: Shelly Beach vs Sherwood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shelly Beach, Queensland and Sherwood, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shelly Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Sherwood (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Shelly Beach or Sherwood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shelly Beach has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Sherwood scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shelly Beach scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Sherwood scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shelly Beach or Sherwood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shelly Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
